translations.en: a spidery looking man with delicate hands.
translations.zh: 一位形如蜘蛛、雙手纖細的男子。

translations.en: "Hello."
translations.zh: 「你好。」

translations.en: "My name is Troy."
translations.zh: 「吾的名字是特洛伊。」

translations.en: "I make @clocks. The movements of the various
translations.zh: 「吾製作@clocks時鐘。各種

translations.en: parts are very
translations.zh: 零件都非常

translations.en: complex and interconnected."
translations.zh: 複雜且相互關聯。」

translations.en: "Like the @moons and stars, or the pieces on a @chess board."
translations.zh: 「就像@moons（月亮）和星辰，或@chess（棋盤）上的棋子。」

translations.en: "The @ticking of clocks is the pulse of @civilization."
translations.zh: 「時鐘的@ticking（滴答）聲是@civilization（文明）的脈搏。」

translations.en: "Without clocks, people would just sit around uselessly, with no idea what to do next!"
translations.zh: 「沒有時鐘，人們就只會無所事事地閒坐，不知道下一步該做什麼！」

translations.en: "Of course, the ticks would be useless without the @tocks."
translations.zh: 「當然，若沒有@tocks（答聲），滴聲也毫無意義。」

translations.en: "They're much deeper sounding and more satisfying than ticks."
translations.zh: 「答聲比滴聲更深沉，更令人滿足。」

translations.en: "@Ephemerides is going to build a model of the whole system."
translations.zh: 「@Ephemerides以弗美瑞底斯打算建造整個星系的模型。」

translations.en: "I helped him design the @gearwork that makes it go."
translations.zh: 「吾幫他設計了驅動它運轉的@gearwork（齒輪）機構。」

translations.en: "I know all about gears."
translations.zh: 「吾對齒輪無所不知。」

translations.en: "He lives at the @Lycaeum."
translations.zh: 「他住在@Lycaeum（學苑）。」

translations.en: "It's a great center of @learning."
translations.zh: 「那是個偉大的@learning（學術）中心。」

translations.en: "If you didn't run around asking foolish questions all the time, you might learn something yourself!"
translations.zh: 「若汝不要整天到處問蠢問題，或許自己也能學到些什麼！」

translations.en: "I like to play chess. Keeps ones @mind fit."
translations.zh: 「吾喜歡下棋。能保持@mind（頭腦）靈活。」

translations.en: "Some people don't use theirs - but I do."
translations.zh: 「有些人不用腦——但吾用。」

translations.en: "Until we come into conjunction again."
translations.zh: 「待吾等再次相會。」

translations.en: "The sound of the clocks is so soothing... Excuse me, did you say something?"
translations.zh: 「時鐘的聲音如此舒心……打擾了，汝說了什麼嗎？」

translator_notes: 特洛伊是個沉迷於時鐘的鐘錶匠，喜歡用天文學比喻（脈搏、相會）。他幫助 Ephemerides 設計了天文儀的齒輪機構。滴答聲（tick/tock）的討論保留趣味性。
